name: Potential Crutch Activity
notes: This rule detects Crutch activity which encrypts and exfiltrates data.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Crutch File Staging, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Crutch Filenames
TD_list: APPLY Potential Crutch Activity on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Crutch File Staging, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Crutch Filenames
RED_list: Event description: Detects Crutch activity which encrypts and exfiltrates data.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
